scripts.clean: powershell -Command "if (Test-Path .turbo) { Remove-Item .turbo -Recurse -Force }; if (Test-Path node_modules) { Remove-Item node_modules -Recurse -Force }; Get-ChildItem -Path . -Directory -Filter .next | ForEach-Object { Remove-Item $_.FullName -Recurse -Force }"
scripts.clean:web: powershell -Command "if (Test-Path apps/web/.next) { Remove-Item apps/web/.next -Recurse -Force }; if (Test-Path apps/web/.turbo) { Remove-Item apps/web/.turbo -Recurse -Force }; if (Test-Path apps/web/node_modules) { Remove-Item apps/web/node_modules -Recurse -Force }"
scripts.clean:all: npm run clean:web && npm run clean
scripts.reinstall: npm run clean:all && npm install && npm run db:generate --workspace=apps/web
